tasks.name: Create QuickActionsPanel component skeleton
tasks.purpose: Establish component structure with props interface and Card layout

constraints: Server component only (no 'use client' directive)
Must accept UserDashboardData type as props
Use semantic Tailwind classes for dark mode support

tasks.input_state: No QuickActionsPanel component exists. UserDashboardData type defined in S1890.I2.F1.
tasks.output_state: QuickActionsPanel.tsx exists with Card structure, props interface, and placeholder content
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders with Card layout and title 'Quick Actions'
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'interface QuickActionsPanelProps' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && grep -q 'CardTitle.*Quick Actions' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add action determination logic for course actions
tasks.purpose: Determine whether to show 'Start Your Journey' or 'Continue Course' based on course progress

constraints: Use If component for conditional rendering
Check courseProgress to determine state
Link to /home/course for both actions
Use Play icon from lucide-react

tasks.input_state: QuickActionsPanel skeleton exists. No action buttons rendered.
tasks.output_state: Component conditionally renders course action button based on courseProgress data
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component shows 'Start Your Journey' if no course progress, 'Continue Course' if progress exists
tasks.verification_command: grep -qE '(Start Your Journey|Continue Course)' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && grep -q 'courseProgress' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add action determination logic for assessment action

action.target: conditional logic for skills assessment action

tasks.purpose: Determine whether to show 'Take Skills Assessment' based on assessment completion

constraints: Use If component for conditional rendering
Check surveyScores to determine if assessment taken
Link to /home/assessment
Use Target icon from lucide-react

tasks.input_state: QuickActionsPanel has course action. No assessment action yet.
tasks.output_state: Component conditionally renders assessment action button if no assessment taken
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component shows 'Take Skills Assessment' button only if surveyScores is null or empty
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'Take Skills Assessment' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && grep -q 'surveyScores' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add action determination logic for presentation actions
tasks.purpose: Show 'Review Storyboard' if drafts exist, and always show 'New Presentation' action

constraints: Use If component for conditional 'Review Storyboard' action
Check presentations for draft status
Link 'Review Storyboard' to /home/ai
Link 'New Presentation' to /home/ai/new
Use FileText icon for Review, Plus icon for New

tasks.input_state: QuickActionsPanel has course and assessment actions. No presentation actions yet.
tasks.output_state: Component conditionally renders 'Review Storyboard' if drafts exist, and always renders 'New Presentation'
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component shows 'Review Storyboard' only if draft presentations exist, and always shows 'New Presentation'
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'Review Storyboard' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && grep -q 'New Presentation' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && grep -q 'presentations' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/quick-actions-panel.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add responsive grid layout and hover animations

action.target: responsive grid and hover styles to action buttons

tasks.purpose: Make actions display in a responsive grid (1 col mobile, 2 col desktop) with subtle hover effects

constraints: Grid: 1 column on mobile, 2 columns on md+
Use gap-3 for spacing between buttons
Add hover:bg-accent transition for buttons
Maintain semantic Tailwind classes for dark mode

tasks.input_state: QuickActionsPanel has all action buttons but no grid layout or hover styles
tasks.output_state: Actions display in responsive grid with hover animations
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Buttons render in grid layout with CSS class 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3' and hover transitions

tasks.name: Add i18n translation keys for action labels
tasks.purpose: Enable internationalization for all action button labels and panel title

constraints: Add keys under 'routes' object in common.json
Use Trans component in QuickActionsPanel for all labels
Keys: quickActions, startJourney, continueCourse, takeAssessment, reviewStoryboard, newPresentation

tasks.input_state: QuickActionsPanel has hardcoded English strings. common.json has no quickActions keys.
tasks.output_state: All action labels use Trans component with i18n keys defined in common.json
tasks.acceptance_criterion: common.json contains quickActions translation keys and component uses Trans for all labels

tasks.name: Integrate QuickActionsPanel into dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Place QuickActionsPanel in dashboard page at row 2, position 2

constraints: Import QuickActionsPanel component
Pass UserDashboardData as props
Place in correct grid position (row 2, position 2)
No 'use client' directive needed in page

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page exists with grid layout. QuickActionsPanel not imported or rendered.
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page imports and renders QuickActionsPanel with data from loader
tasks.acceptance_criterion: page.tsx imports QuickActionsPanel and renders it with UserDashboardData props
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'import.*QuickActionsPanel' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q '<QuickActionsPanel' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck
